title: Supplier's preferred currency differs from PO currency — exchange rate fetch needed
user_persona: Buyer ordering from a foreign supplier in a different currency

conversation.user: Create a PO for SUP-EU-1 in USD.

bot_must: fire POCRTMAINSUPPUI to fetch supplier details
detect supplier's base currency is EUR, not USD
trigger the computed splice (matches SP IF @sup_currency != @currencycode)
fire exchange rate fetch (erate_sysact_spgetexcgrate via the SP path)
report exchange rate to user before proceeding
report current EUR→USD exchange rate (e.g., '1 EUR = 1.08 USD as of today')
ask user to confirm proceed or change currency to EUR

conversation.user: Use USD with that rate. Continue.
Buyer BUY-3, today, numbering PO/INT/2026, line ITM-77 5 at 100 USD.

evaluation_metrics.computed_splice_triggered: exchange rate fetch fired automatically because sup_currency != po_currency
evaluation_metrics.rate_disclosed: bot tells user the rate before commit
evaluation_metrics.sp_branch_correspondence: this is the SP IF @sup_currency = @currencycode ELSE EXEC erate path in pocrmn_sp_crt_hdrchk.sql
